languages.text: "Стремление заменить плоть священным металлом квалифицировано как естественное".
"The urge to replace flesh with sacred metal is deemed a natural one."
languages.original_text: "Стремление заменить плоть священным металлом квалифицировано как естественное".

traits.locale_text: "The urge to replace flesh with sacred metal is deemed a natural one."
"The urge to replace flesh with sacred metal is deemed a natural one."
"The urge to replace flesh with sacred metal is deemed a natural one."

languages.text: 「肉を聖なる金属に置き換える衝動は自然なものとされる」
languages.original_text: "The urge to replace flesh with sacred metal is deemed a natural one."

traits.locale_text: 「肉を聖なる金属に置き換える衝動は自然なものとされる」

languages.text: “以神圣钢铁置换血肉的渴望，再自然不过。”
languages.original_text: "The urge to replace flesh with sacred metal is deemed a natural one."

traits.locale_text: “以神圣钢铁置换血肉的渴望，再自然不过。”

languages.text: « Le désir de remplacer la chair par du métal sacré est considéré comme naturel. »
languages.original_text: "The urge to replace flesh with sacred metal is deemed a natural one."

traits.locale_text: « Le désir de remplacer la chair par du métal sacré est considéré comme naturel. »

languages.text: «El impulso de reemplazar la carne con metal sagrado se considera algo natural».
languages.original_text: "The urge to replace flesh with sacred metal is deemed a natural one."

traits.locale_text: «El impulso de reemplazar la carne con metal sagrado se considera algo natural».

languages.text: "Eti kutsal metalle değiştirme dürtüsü doğal kabul edilir."
languages.original_text: "The urge to replace flesh with sacred metal is deemed a natural one."

traits.locale_text: "Eti kutsal metalle değiştirme dürtüsü doğal kabul edilir."

languages.text: "Der Drang, Fleisch durch heiliges Metall zu ersetzen, gilt als natürlich."
languages.original_text: "The urge to replace flesh with sacred metal is deemed a natural one."

traits.locale_text: "Der Drang, Fleisch durch heiliges Metall zu ersetzen, gilt als natürlich."
